> **If you are reporting an active exploit or a Critical issue, prefer the
> private [GitHub Security tab](../../security/advisories/new) instead of
> this template.** This issue is NOT fully private — strip exploit details
> and secrets. See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for the full policy.

**Proof of concept** (sanitize before pasting — no live secrets, no real
